summary: Optimize ccc-state-controller project with comprehensive unit test coverage and UI/UX refactoring following ui-ux-pro-max guidelines
approach: Phased implementation: (1) Expand installer module unit tests for version-manager, file-copier, validator; (2) Refactor panel UI preserving Cocos Creator 2.x compatibility; (3) Add Jest+jsdom tests for panel logic; (4) Add edge case and error handling tests
recommended_execution: Phased - IMPL-001 and IMPL-002 can run in parallel; IMPL-003 depends on IMPL-002; IMPL-004 depends on IMPL-001

conventions: Pure Logic Strategy for installer tests
UI Component Strategy for panel tests
constraints: No emoji icons - use SVG only

phases.name: Phase 1: Unit Test Enhancement
phases.description: Expand installer module tests for version-manager, file-copier, validator

phases.name: Phase 2: UI Refactoring
phases.description: Refactor panel UI with ui-ux-pro-max guidelines

phases.name: Phase 3: Panel Test Coverage
phases.description: Add Jest+jsdom tests for panel logic

phases.name: Phase 4: Edge Case Coverage
phases.description: Add edge case and error handling tests
